name: S3 / Blob Auditor
description: Find misconfigured S3 buckets and exposed cloud storage.
long_description: Find misconfigured S3 buckets and exposed cloud storage.

fields.label: Search Query
fields.help: Enter an Uncover search query to identify exposed cloud storage assets. Examples include bucket names, domains, or organization filters.

fields.label: Result Limit
fields.help: Maximum number of results to return. Increase for broader discovery or reduce to limit output volume.

safety.consent_message: Cloud storage auditing should be scoped to authorized assets.
